news_items.headline: Iran war triggers largest oil supply shock on record; ~1 billion barrels cumulative lost; 14M b/d production shut-in
news_items.data_pt: March-May 2026 | Supply loss exceeds 1 billion barrels; 14M b/d production shut-in; Strait Hormuz (35% seaborne crude) effectively closed; drone/missile damage Qatar LNG 20% supply loss

news_items.headline: South Korea positioned for 5th global export rank; semiconductor sector leading with AI demand tailwind
news_items.data_pt: Q1 2026 | South Korea $219.9B exports vs Japan $120.3B, Italy $118.3B; 5th place expected (vs 7th prior); chip boom sustains export leadership

news_items.headline: World Bank: Energy prices +24% in 2026 (highest since Ukraine 2022); developing economy inflation +100bps to 5.1%
news_items.data_pt: April 2026 | Commodity prices +16% in 2026; energy +24% YoY; developing economy inflation 5.1% (up from 4.7% forecast pre-war); growth downside -0.4pp to 3.6%
